data.speaker: Glint
data.text: Oh! A visitor! The springs don't get many Keepers this far out.

data.speaker: Glint
data.text: Mana flows from the springs into everything — the soil, the spirits, even you. It's the lifeblood of the Ather.

data.speaker: Glint
data.text: Harvest mana shards from the blue nodes. They're useful for alchemy, farming, and just about everything else.
